## Goal
Change `admin/vite.config.ts` from `sourcemap: true` to `sourcemap: 'hidden'` so map files are generated for Sentry upload but the `//# sourceMappingURL=` comment is stripped from deployed JS bundles, preventing public information disclosure of the un-minified admin SPA source.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Change `sourcemap: true` to `sourcemap: 'hidden'` in `admin/vite.config.ts`
- [ ] Verify `@sentry/vite-plugin` still picks up the hidden maps and uploads them successfully in CI
- [ ] Confirm the built `dist/` directory no longer contains reachable `*.map` references in the JS output (e.g. `grep -r sourceMappingURL dist/assets/*.js` returns nothing)

## Files likely touched
- `admin/vite.config.ts`

## Test plan
**Manual:**
- Run `npm run build` in `admin/`
- Check `dist/assets/*.js` files for the `sourceMappingURL` comment — must be absent
- Verify `*.js.map` files still exist in `dist/` so the Sentry plugin can upload them

**Automated:**
- CI Sentry upload step must exit 0

## Handoff notes
(Each agent appends a dated entry here on handoff. Do not edit prior entries.)

2026-04-22 — Promoted from discovery `2026-04-22-admin-sourcemaps-public.md` found during OPS-002 review. One-word fix but requires CI verification of Sentry upload.
